key_insight: An open-source, template-matching workflow can accurately index AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns to map crystal orientation at nanoscale resolution.
engineering_relevance: This enables higher-resolution orientation mapping for polycrystalline materials relevant to fuel cells and battery cathodes, supporting microstructure-to-property design.
method: Generate a dynamical master pattern with open-source simulation software.
Import the master pattern into an open-source geometric simulation/indexing package for template matching.
Apply the workflow to AC-STEM TKD data from BZCYYb4411 and LNO samples.
evidence_signal: The best-matched simulated patterns showed strong agreement with experimental AC-STEM data, even with limited diffraction space for matching.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality of the simulated master pattern and the restricted diffraction information available in AC-STEM TKD.
paper_title: Orientation Mapping via Dictionary Indexing of AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns using Open-source Software
